requirement_topic.zht: OCPP 與 EMC 後台互通

summary.en: OCPP is the open communication protocol between charging stations and charging management systems. OCPP 1.6, OCPP 2.0.1, and OCPP 2.1 are used internationally; OCPP 2.0.1 edition 3 was approved as IEC 63584 in 2024 and OCPP 2.1 in 2025. North Macedonia projects may require OCPP through operator backend, automation, tender, roaming, payment, maintenance, and grid-interaction specifications even when OCPP is not the whole-unit product approval route.
summary.zh: OCPP是充电站与充电管理系统之间的开放通信协议。国际上常见版本为OCPP 1.6、OCPP 2.0.1和OCPP 2.1；OCPP 2.0.1第3版于2024年获批为IEC 63584，OCPP 2.1于2025年发布。北马其顿项目即使不以OCPP为整机批准路径，也可能在运营商后台、自动化、招标、漫游、支付、维护和电网互动规范中要求其支持。
summary.zht: OCPP 是充電站與充電管理系統之間的開放通訊協定。國際上常見版本為 OCPP 1.6、OCPP 2.0.1 與 OCPP 2.1；OCPP 2.0.1 第3版於2024年獲批為 IEC 63584，OCPP 2.1 於2025年發布。北馬其頓專案即使不將 OCPP 當作整機產品批准路徑，亦可能因營運商後台、自動化、招標、漫遊、支付、維護與電網互動規範要求支援 OCPP。

summary.en: Chinese DC chargers commonly rely on GB/T 27930 for charger-to-vehicle communication. That protocol is not an operator backend protocol and does not replace OCPP implementation, cybersecurity profiles, backend acceptance testing, remote firmware update procedures, or operator data interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电机通常依赖GB/T 27930进行充电机与车辆电池管理系统通信。该协议不是运营商后台协议，不能替代OCPP实现、网络安全配置、后台验收测试、远程固件更新流程或运营商数据接口。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電機通常依賴 GB/T 27930 進行充電樁與車輛電池管理系統通訊。該協定不是營運商後台協定，不能替代 OCPP 實作、網路安全設定、後台驗收測試、遠端韌體更新流程或營運商資料介面。

gap.en: The North Macedonia project file should identify exact OCPP version, security profile, certificate handling, meter-value mapping, transaction model, remote reset and firmware process, SIM or Ethernet architecture, local operator endpoint, and test evidence from the target charging management system.
gap.zh: 北马其顿项目文件应明确目标OCPP版本、安全配置、证书处理、计量值映射、交易模型、远程复位和固件流程、SIM或以太网架构、当地运营商后台端点，以及目标充电管理系统提供的测试证据。
gap.zht: 北馬其頓專案文件應明確目標 OCPP 版本、安全設定、憑證處理、計量值映射、交易模型、遠端重設與韌體流程、SIM 或乙太網架構、本地營運商後台端點，以及目標充電管理系統的測試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Usually mandatory when required by the operator, tender, automation integration, roaming, payment, maintenance, or grid-interaction specification; OCPP is not by itself a whole-unit safety certification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is vehicle-side DC charging communication and does not satisfy backend OCPP requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm OCPP version and security profile with the North Macedonia operator before shipment. GB/T 27930 support does not prove backend interoperability with ERC-facing or operator-facing charging management systems.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出货前应与北马其顿运营商确认OCPP版本和安全配置。支持GB/T 27930并不能证明与ERC相关或运营商面向后台的充电管理系统互操作。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出貨前應與北馬其頓營運商確認 OCPP 版本與安全設定。支援 GB/T 27930 並不代表與 ERC 或營運商後台充電管理系統具備互操作性。
